stage_descriptions.CBM: Cat Be Mi — cong doan dau tien, cat va chuan bi be mi (khung kim loai/zirconia)
stage_descriptions.SÁP/Cadcam: Thiet ke va duc sap, hoac xu ly Cadcam. Co the lam song song voi CBM
stage_descriptions.SƯỜN: Lam suon rang, kiem tra khap cat. Cong doan QC quan trong
stage_descriptions.ĐẮP: Dep so/ceramic len suon — NUT THAT LON NHAT, thuong chiem nhieu thoi gian nhat
stage_descriptions.MÀI: Mai tinh, danh bong, kiem tra cuoi truoc khi giao

Zirconia.note: Can kilnnung, thoi gian cho giua cac cong doan

Veneer.time: 2-3 ngay, doi hoi tay nghe cao

sua_laitiep.note: Don sua/lai tiep → skip 3 cong doan dau → chi lam ĐẮP + MÀI. Thuong lam gap

thu_suon.note: Don thu suon (TS) → skip 2 cong doan cuoi → chi lam CBM→SÁP→SƯỜN roi tra lai. Thuong can lam nhanh
